name: cc-failover
description: Migrates the current session to a fallback coding agent when Claude Code hits a StopFailure event (rate limit, billing error, server outage, etc.).

destination.title: Destination tool
destination.description: Agent to migrate to on failure. Accepted values: codex, gemini, cursor

trigger_errors.title: Error types that trigger migration
trigger_errors.description: StopFailure error codes that should auto-migrate. Options: rate_limit, billing_error, server_error, max_output_tokens, authentication_failed
